description: Fantastic. It meets virtually all or needs and provides the support/service unlike I have ever seen!
author: Craig K.
pros: Great flexibility with licenses. Curated library of content that "fits" our Team Members learning needs. Ease of use has increased our frequency of use. Ease of use, implementation, and integration. Great service/support from our rep...[sensitive content hidden]. This is exactly what we were looking for...the number of features is excellent, great value!
cons: All subjects needing to be available in Spanish. However, I have been informed that this is coming soon. An App would be nice.

description: So far so good, we are enjoying discovering what we can do and the potential the platform has for us.
author: Serena M.
pros: The initial setup was easy and the support we received was great. We found plenty of options to work with to ensure we can provide an interactive foundation for our training.
cons: We would love to see more options around the branding, being able to present the the platform to our organisation with our branding and colour schemes
author_profession: Interim Business Process Manager and Training and Quality Manager

review_title: Easy, quick and easily personally paced learning system
description: These courses, even though they are very good, are still fairly "light" compared to some large-scale industry certified trainings. But I think these work well for junior, or if you want to learn more but not necessary are ready to take the step for the many weeks or months of studying (e.g. some PM certifications). But for e.g. a PM, I think you would be able to do the work well on GoSkills certificate alone.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like that this GoSkills VERY quick to take to use. Just minutes. I also like that you can do a bit of learning each day - like all professionals, I am very busy at my work, and it's very hard as a consultant to dedicate full days for learning. I also learn better when I can process it in between. I like that there are actual exercise files and quizzes to ensure the learning.
cons: The software is fine, but I do not like those courses where only a person is speaking and there is no actual materials shared (like a presentation). That's just being lazy. I would also like to receive the share presentations as e.g. PDF, as you would in any other training. (Which would cost more of course.)

description: First time user and learning how to navigate and utilize to its best potential. Once we navigate through the free version experience the plan is to test an grow from there.
author: Liz H.
pros: The various levels and the ability to add on learners as an admin has potential to utilize as a training platform.
cons: The free version gives us a sneak peek at what we can grow from. Only 5 video sessions allowed on the free version. I would have liked to see more like 10 allowed.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Emily C.
pros: easy to use and great pre built microsoft office courses, easy to assign user licenses and assign courses
cons: would like easier visibility of user's activity - can be difficult to track when and what they have been doing

description: Really great experience. The app is great. Learning is easy. The app allows for students to quickly and easily pick up where they left off.
author: Vishal S.
pros: Ease of learning is the best. Courses are in depth. The quality of learning is beyond any other mooch app.
cons: I would like a more interactive interface. I would prefer having multiple assessments instead of one major one.

review_title: User friendly, great options, cost effective and engaging.
description: As a user, the blended learning approach is appreciated where, you can download notes or view videos.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: As an administrator, the uploading of content was easy, pulling customized report was intuitive and assigning of courses to employees was very easy. The flexibility of assigning and rotating licenses was also cost friendly. The administrative support by Go Skills staff [sensitive content hidden] continues to be just awesome.
cons: Integration with other HR system, access to higher level courses. No other issues. to report at this time.

description: Absolutely fantastic website for learning a vast variety of content on the fly. There are some improvements and course reviews to be made, but overall it is a great way for continuous learning.
author: Michael Y.
pros: Easily manageable bite-sized lessons, can start learning whenever there's a gap of free time, even a small one.
cons: When viewing GoSkills through Apple devices, instead of the videos showing up in the default quicktime player, the video plays from the website's browser, which can sometimes cause a bug where no audio comes though, and this can only be fixed by refreshing the webpage. The website's browser also leaves the whole URL bar visible, which is not fully utilising the screen space. This can probably be fixed by creating their own app.

description: I wanted to learn Agile for so long, I tried many platform, many course, but my best fit was with GoSkills
author: Pascal Uriel E.
pros: GoSkills plateform is very polished, event hard topic are well presented and very easy to understand!
cons: Limited choose of training, it will come with time I am sure
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Great! Easy to use, tons of info and resources.
author: John K.
pros: There is a large variety of courses to choose from
cons: Some courses can be a little dry. Could use a little more interactivity.

description: I love it, fits perfectly in my work schedule on the go
author: Leonardo P.
pros: Leadership is practical and quick for a on the go manager.
cons: Less Quizzes, not necessary based on the material being taught. If I’m training and learning, quizzes are not mandated.

description: My favorite was the Outlook training. I had no idea all that Outlook could do. Also the Management training was good. I also learned a lot of skills in Excel that I didn't know.
author: Dagnine M.
pros: It's easy to learn with their helpful videos.
cons: I have to pull up the software I'm learning to try to put what I'm learning to practice while watching the video. This could be a problem is someone doesn't have the software. They just wouldn't get as much of a hands on experience. (I am a hands on learner)

review_title: GoSkills has Got what I need!
description: Dusting off some old skills and learning some new ones.
author: Megan W.
pros: I like that the format is standardized (Bite size videos, excersize files, notes, quiz, exam, certificate) Easy to use. Broad offering of services.
cons: Would like the option for courses to lead into actual certifications with PMP, Microsoft. Would like more advanced options, some courses are the basics.

review_title: This Course is Worth Your Time and Money
author: Adam L.
pros: Easy to use, good examples, knowledgable instructors.
cons: I would have prefered more work with formulas.

description: I've only taken one course so far but I loved it and got a lot out of it. I purchased the Unlimited access and plan on taking as many courses as I can, that relate to me.
author: Travis L.
pros: I love the platform, it's very easy to use and the contents is informative and useful.
cons: I don;t really have any complaints. I've noticed a few typos and have sent them to support and they responded that they would correct them.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Sneha M.
pros: I loved how short the lessons were and how targeted they were.
cons: I wish there were some more “dig deeper” features that are maybe optional for the cert but would be useful if you want to specialize a bit more in that area of the software you are studying.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Microsoft Excel Basic delivers the basics and some great tips
description: I often try to put data into a chart/table, but have typically used Word--not very efficient. I will be using Excel much more now.
author: Cynthia D.
pros: There is so much built into the software. It's way more complex and has so many uses.
cons: Oh, the formulas are hard to master. A lot of practice is needed.

author: Brandon H.
pros: It has taught me so much! I have been some type of assistant my whole life, and I have learned something new on every training module!
cons: I can not name one con about the software.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Kevin B.
pros: Easy if use and simplicity Very good for quick skill building
cons: Needs more reference material.no issues otherwise
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I'm still a business man in training to have his own business so I haven't had the chance to apply what I've learned yet. But we can all take solace in the fact that it'll be this training that helps me get there.
author: Jua Wan L.
pros: The instructors not only have the knowledge and wisdom to back up their instruction to us but they also display a contagious enthusiasm and even at times a humorous vibe when they share examples and stories in their videos.
cons: None. I'm completely satisfied with everything on this software.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great Courses to strengthen your resume!
description: Great courses, I am using them to strengthen my resume.
author: Shiann C.
pros: The website was very smooth, and informative. It was very easy to navigate and get my certificate in a timely manner.
cons: The price was a little high when other websites offer cheaper courses, and include the full course in their free trial.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Madeline H.
pros: The ease of use and self pacing of courses fits well into busy schedules. Excel instructor was great.
cons: Variety of courses. Expand programs but there is a good solid base.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Yahaya D.
pros: The programme is highly interactive and educational
cons: There appears to be none as it is easy to use
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall its an amazing learning tool! I have used it to train my team and help with the onboarding of new people in the company
author: Art Justine O.
pros: Its user interface is great and easy. I enjoy the way they organized each boxes and fields. Its easy to use.
cons: quiz and exam creation. I am sometime having a hard time putting quizzes and exams. I think they should have an option to bulk upload questionnaire and answers from excel.

review_title: Good expeirience, I wish they offered more courses
description: Overall, it is a great experience. They are easy to work with and provide quick replies to questions. they offer a good customer experience.
author: Ethan D.
pros: Its ease of use, and courses that were relevant to us. the ability to customize content in the courses.
cons: I wish there were more courses offered. What they have is could but there are other services that offer more.
